ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-07-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-01-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-24-2016 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-12-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Linda Gould for Petitioner John Gersich; Kelsey Quaranto for and with Petitioner Wilford Gardner.

The Court noted that there were two competing petitions for letters of administration, one brought by Petitioner Gersich to have a professional fiduciary appointed as administrator of the estate, and one by family member Wilford Gardner to have himself appointed to serve in that capacity. The Court declared that as a family member, Mr. Gardner has statutory proirity. Ms. Gould stated that she agreed, that her client had only applied for appointment as administrator when no one else had done so and it appeared none would, and that her client was happy to step back now that a family member has stepped forward. The Court denied the Petition of John Gersich, and granted Mr. Gardner's Petition for Letters (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $500,000.00 is required. The Court set a status hearing re closing of the estate for February 7, 2017, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-04-2015 Denied

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-21-2015 Continued To Aug-04-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-23-2015 Continued To Jul-21-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Linda Gould for and with (proposed Adminsitrator) John Gersich. Wilford Gardner (son) in Propria Persona.

The court stated this is a petition for letters of administration on behalf of Mr. Gersich, that no objections have been filed but that a request for special notice regarding the property was filed. Mr. Gardner stated that he is objecting to this petition, that he was unable to talk to an attorney until yesterday and that he was advised to ask for a 45 day continuance. The Court pointed out to Mr. Gardner that the current petition seeks to give him a 50% share that would not have been given to him under the will, that he was told at the previous hearing that his objections would need to be in writing and asked why he would want to hold the matter up. Mr. Gardner stated again that he was unable to speak to counsel until yesterday. Ms. Gould stated that this matter has been going on for some time and that they need to get an administrator appointed. The court stated that it was frustrated and disappointed that the objections have not been filed and that an attorney is not in place yet. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to July 21, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If Mr. Gardner plans to object he must have filed and served the documents by July 14, 2015.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar May-27-2015 Continued To Jun-23-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Linda Gould for (Proposed Administrator) John Gersich. Wilford Gardner (Beneficiary) in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that we have 2 petitions and no original will. Mr. Gardner stated that he is here to object to both petitions and asked the court questions regarding paying taxes and where to obtain forms to object. The court suggested that Mr. Gardner seek counsel. Ms. Gould stated that they are both in agreement to take Mr. Michael Gardner's petition off calendar. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to June 23, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and Mr. Gardner is instructed to file and serve his objections in the next 2 weeks. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
